title: Project Specification: Property-Pi (5-Unit Rental Manager)
summary: Defines Property-Pi as a lightweight property management app for small landlords with core features and technical stack.
key_points: Target user: small-scale landlords managing ~5 units
Core features: Unit/Lease management, Financial tracking, Communication
Original tech stack proposed: Next.js, PostgreSQL/Prisma, NextAuth (now superseded by ARCHITECTURE-DECISION.md)
Three-phase roadmap: MVP (Phase 1), Maintenance & Expenses (Phase 2), Automation & Documents (Phase 3)
Success metrics: 5-second unit status view, clear rent tracking, monthly profit visibility
conflicts_with: ARCHITECTURE-DECISION.md (tech stack changed from Prisma/PostgreSQL to PocketBase/FastAPI)
